name: Federal Realty Investment Trust Depositary Shares each representing a 1/1000th interest in a 5.000% Series C Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Share
summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust Depositary Shares each representing a 1/1000th interest in a 5.000% Series C Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Share represents preferred stock issued by Federal Realty Investment Trust. These shares provide a fixed dividend payment and have preference over common stock in the event of liquidation. Depositary receipts represent ownership in these preferred shares.
